## Rules

1. No `TF-*` implementation in Noetfield `services/`, `apps/`, or www payment surfaces.
2. Noetfield may **reference** TrustField only in historical SSOT (`docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH/`) — product behavior follows [STRATEGIC_LOCK.md](../../../STRATEGIC_LOCK.md).
3. VIRLUX remains under [../virlux/](../virlux/) — also external.
